project.name: codex-main-agent-workflow
project.goal: 将第一批默认、第二批按需切换的 DESIGN 使用策略写入文档

requests.goal: 目前工作流的agents后续，每次完成任务都要写成md文档后，发给主AGENT让他来处理。让子agent通过读取md文档来获取信息 而不是上下文
把这个工作流部署到桌面的移动端文件夹中
目前这个工作流中有哪些agents
有很多提示词，只有这三类吗 细致给我分类一下，分别有什么岗位的，主要负责什么任务
这些提示词模板是从github其他网站借鉴修改的，还是你自己写的
根据 karpathy/autoresearch、msitarzewski/agency-agents、affaan-m/everything-claude-code 三个仓库优化当前工作流与提示词模板
解释新增并接入 security-child.md、research-child.md，并强化证据化输出与失败回路的作用
以编程开发为主优化当前工作流：强化 coding->testing->acceptance 闭环，减少非开发角色干扰
新增规范：每次执行任务前必须先告知用户将修改内容，再执行
帮我查看一下4月16日的token消耗量
子agent的工作汇报必须以md文件提交，任务输入必须读取md handoff而不是上下文
前端UI功能与 VoltAgent/awesome-design-md 的UI功能对比，判断哪个更好
将工作流优化并合并 awesome-design-md 的 DESIGN.md 能力，删除冗余内容，按编程开发优先重构
解释 profile 是什么，并确认是否已把 awesome-design-md 全量加入；按需继续借鉴集成
评估导入常用awesome-design-md UI资源的token消耗，并给出低消耗导入策略
批量导入大部分常用 awesome-design-md profile，并设置默认项目 DESIGN.md
继续按 VoltAgent/awesome-design-md 借鉴并用于UI开发基线
将第一批默认、第二批按需切换的 DESIGN 使用策略写入文档

tasks.title: Intake And Baseline
tasks.description: Main AGENT reads incoming requests and discovers available project checks.
acceptance_criteria: ac.check_discovery: project checks are discovered or marked skipped
ac.intake_ready: workflow is ready to accept one or more user requests

tasks.title: Plan Request req_001
tasks.description: Main AGENT plans and dispatches request req_001: 目前工作流的agents后续，每次完成任务都要写成md文档后，发给主AGENT让他来处理。让子agent通过读取md文档来获取信息 而不是上下文
context_files: docs/09-缁熶竴浠诲姟鎷嗚В鏂规.md
acceptance_criteria: ac.split_order: tasks are split by deliverable then code boundary then acceptance method
ac.parallel_safety: parallel tasks do not overlap in unsafe scope
ac.dispatch_ready: each child task has scope, context_files, and acceptance_criteria

tasks.title: Update Developer Docs
tasks.description: Implement request req_001 for area 'docs': 目前工作流的agents后续，每次完成任务都要写成md文档后，发给主AGENT让他来处理。让子agent通过读取md文档来获取信息 而不是上下文
acceptance_criteria: ac.scope_only: changed files stay under docs/ or README.md
ac.docs_match: docs evidence reflects implemented behavior
ac.validation: include doc review result in evidence

tasks.title: Tester Validation
tasks.description: Tester AGENT validates request req_001 and returns findings to the main AGENT.
acceptance_criteria: ac.quality_checks: build/typecheck/lint/test results are recorded
ac.report_format: tester output includes pass_or_fail, checks, findings, and evidence
ac.evidence_schema: evidence lines follow cmd|result|log format

tasks.title: Main Acceptance Decision
tasks.description: Main AGENT accepts or retries request req_001 after tester feedback.
acceptance_criteria: ac.decision_made: decision is one of accept, retry, or block
ac.retry_route: retry decision points to optimization tasks
ac.reason_present: retry or block includes a concrete reason

tasks.title: Summarize Delivery
tasks.description: Main AGENT summarizes only accepted work for request req_001.
acceptance_criteria: ac.status_consistent: request status and task states are internally consistent
ac.accepted_only: summary includes only accepted work
ac.evidence_linked: summary references decision evidence paths

acceptance_criteria: ac.scope_only: changed files stay under src/, app/, pages/, components/, or web/
ac.ui_behavior: tester evidence confirms requested UI behavior
ac.validation: include at least one pass result from build/typecheck/lint/test
ac.worker_md_report: worker returns a markdown report path under reports/results/

tasks.title: Tester Validation
tasks.description: Tester AGENT validates request req_013 and returns findings to the main AGENT.
acceptance_criteria: ac.quality_checks: build/typecheck/lint/test results are recorded
ac.report_format: tester output includes pass_or_fail, checks, findings, and evidence
ac.evidence_schema: evidence lines follow cmd|result|log format
ac.tester_md_report: tester returns a markdown report path under reports/results/

tasks.title: Main Acceptance Decision
tasks.description: Main AGENT accepts or retries request req_013 after tester feedback.
acceptance_criteria: ac.decision_made: decision is one of accept, retry, or block
ac.retry_route: retry decision points to optimization tasks
ac.reason_present: retry or block includes a concrete reason

tasks.title: Summarize Delivery
tasks.description: Main AGENT summarizes only accepted work for request req_013.
acceptance_criteria: ac.status_consistent: request status and task states are internally consistent
ac.accepted_only: summary includes only accepted work
ac.evidence_linked: summary references decision evidence paths
